name: token-audit
description: Token Audit — API Relay security audit tool. TypeScript + Node.js backend with a Vue 3 frontend.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
scripts.python:setup: python3 -m venv audit_py/.venv && audit_py/.venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && audit_py/.venv/bin/python -m pip install -r audit_py/requirements.txt
